one_line_positioning: AI Product Engineer who builds hyper-personalized consumer AI experiences from prototype to production
narrative_angle: Consumer AI founder turned product engineer, bringing AI-native personalization and entrepreneurial ownership to e-commerce
proof_points_to_emphasize: Built hyper-personalized AI companion (memory, multi-agent) for consumer engagement
50x cost reduction and 5x latency improvement in production LLM systems
Scaled consumer AI to 450+ users via AI-driven marketing automation
Designed real-time data pipelines and REST APIs for mission-critical systems
things_to_downplay: Enterprise data platform migration (Ericsson – not e-commerce)
Lack of Shopify, MoEngage, or Dynamics 365 experience
tone_guidance: Direct, product-focused, customer-centric, avoiding enterprise terminology and emphasizing consumer outcomes
recruiter_first_impression_target: A builder who personalizes customer experiences with AI, not just a backend developer
reasoning: Strong AI engineering and product shipping evidence transfers well to e-commerce personalization, but lacks domain-specific tools (Shopify, MoEngage) and strong front-end skills. Entrepreneurial mindset fits CEO's office. Risk: no direct retail experience.
